strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
The Arsonist is a close-ranged tank who uses fire as a means to an end. Managing his Overheat meter allows him to deal high amounts of damage to groups of enemies. Balance is crucial to victory.

< ! > Your attacks will be weaker when you're overheating. If you're in a tight spot, Cleanse can immediately end the overheating period in exchange for extending its cooldown duration.

< ! > Masochism's Anticipation stacks still build during the ability's duration, meaning you can activate it early and exit with the max duration.

< ! > Cleanse can remove the fire debuff from your passive. Use it to get out of a pinch.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_LORE:
A u d i o  r e c o r d i n g  t a k e n  f r o m  p e r s o n a l  r e c o r d i n g  d e v i c e .

P r i n t i n g  t r a n s c r i p t . . .

Joining the UES proved to be easy. Especially with their job listings. 

A demolitions expert is not much different from the type of work that I already do. And yes, arson is work. The military had been kind enough to leave the old equipment of the Incendiary Unit lying around for keen eyes like mine to find. It wasn’t difficult learning exactly what they were trying to do with that unit, and it was a damned shame that they shut it down.

They were brilliant. They were brilliant, and the UES told them they were psychopaths. I was only able to barely salvage the remnants of what little hadn’t been completely destroyed. Even then, I haven’t gotten much of a chance to test my restorations with the high security of my division.

I heard from a colleague that there was a job happening. Some sort of rescue mission aboard the UES Safe Travels to an uncharted planet. I’ve heard stories of that place, not so nice ones about the creatures that live there.

Hm.

Maybe I’ll go. Sounds like I’ll find some very good lab rats.

E n d  o f  r e c o r d i n g .
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..and so he left, with new bloodlust set ablaze.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..and so he vanished, his only regret: a job left unfinished.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTIO: Resist fire damage from all sources. Convert one attack dealing greater than <style=cIsDamage>30%</style> of total health into <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> fire damage over time.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PASSIVE_NORMAL_GAU: Deal <style=cIsDamage>100%</style> damage in white portion. Base Gauge is resistant to Overheating.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PASSIVE_BLUE_GAUGE: Deal <style=cIsDamage>70%</style> damage in white portion, deal <style=cIsDamage>250%</style> damage in blue portion. Maximum heat is fixed.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PRIMARY_FIRESPRAY_: <style=cIsUtility>Heat. </style>Fire a ball of fire that deals <style=cIsDamage>225% damage and ignites</style> enemies on hit.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_ALT_PRIMARY_FIRESP: <style=cIsUtility>Heat. </style><style=cIsUtility>Supercritical. </style>Fire a ball of fire that deals <style=cIsDamage>160% damage and ignites</style> enemies on hit.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PRIMARY_FLAMETHROW: Fire a beam of fire that deals <style=cIsDamage>90%</style> damage. Has increased chance to ignite the closer you are to the target.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PRIMARY_FIRESPRAY_: <style=cIsUtility>Heat. </style>Fire a piercing beam of intense heat that deals <style=cIsDamage>300% damage and ignites</style> enemies on hit.If held held for short time, fire a destructive beam that deals <style=cIsDamage>450% damage</style> when released.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PRIMARY_FLAMETHROW: Fire an intense beam that deals <style=cIsDamage>140% damage.</style> Has increased chance to ignite the closer you are to the target. If held for 2 seconds or more, Fire a final beam on release for <style=cIsDamage>150% damage.</style>
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SECONDARY_FLAREGUN: Fire a flare that deals <style=cIsDamage>400%</style> damage over 5 seconds, then explodes for <style=cIsDamage>400%</style> damage, launching 5 flares that deal <style=cIsDamage>200%</style> damage each.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SECONDARY_PUNCH_DE: <style=cIsUtility>Agile. Heat. </style>Propel yourself forwards, blasting enemies behind you for <style=cIsDamage>200% damage</style>. Colliding shortly after launching into the first enemy and deals <style=cIsDamage>200% damage</style> in a blast around you.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_UTILITY_CLEANSE_DE: <style=cIsUtility>Agile. Heat. </style><style=cIsDamage>Ignite</style> the area around you, dealing <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> to enemies around you and burning away other status effects. Grants a small boost of speed.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SPECIAL_MASOCHIST_: <style=cIsUtility>Agile. Heat. </style>Damage from being <style=cIsDamage>Ignited</style> turns into <style=cIsHealing>healing</style> for 6.5 seconds. Increases attack speed <style=cIsDamage>125%</style>.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SPECIAL_MASOCHISM_: Upon reaching the <color=#FF9402>Anticipation</color> threshold, periodically damage yourself in exchange for area of effect burning <color=#9FFF02>Lifesteal</color>. After a maximum of 10 seconds, <style=cIsDamage>Detonate</style>, then <color=#E40000>Overheat</color>.

Upon reaching the <color=#FF9402>Anticipation</color> threshold, you move faster, and are granted <color=#FF9402>Double Tap</color> and <color=#9FFF02>Lifesteal</color>. After a maximum of 10 seconds, <style=cIsDamage>Detonate</style>, then <color=#E40000>Overheat</color>.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_PASSIVE: <style=cKeywordName>Heat</style>Skills increase/decrease heat. At max heat, arsonist overheats, weakening their skills and causing longer cooldowns. Attack speed increases cooling rate. The selected primary chosen alters the heat gauge.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_BASEGAUGE: <style=cKeywordName>Base Gauge</style>Heat gauge increase per level as well as with stock-based items. Cooling rate also increases at higher %s of heat.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_CRITICALGA: <style=cKeywordName>Supercritical Gauge</style>Heat gauge does not increase, instead supercritical gauge increases per level as well as with stock-based items. Gain 2.5x damage while heat is in the blue portion of the gauge.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_FIRESPRAYH: <style=cKeywordName>Heat</style>Costs <style=cIsDamage>10 heat</style>. Reduced damage and speed in overheat.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_PRIMARYHEA: <style=cKeywordName>Heat</style>Primary fire raises heat, all other skills lower heat. At maximum heat, Arsonist Overheats, reducing attack speed and damage temporarily.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_FLAREHEAT: <style=cKeywordName>Heat</style>Reduces Heat by <style=cIsDamage>0.3x</style> of current heat accumulated. Half damage in overheat.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_ZEROPOINTH: <style=cKeywordName>Heat</style>Cools <style=cIsUtility>half of CURRENT heat</style>. Half damage in overheat.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_CLEANSEHEA: <style=cKeywordName>Heat</style>Cools <style=cIsUtility>half of TOTAL heat</style>. Accelerates cooling in overheat, however, no ignite.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_FLARENOTE: The flare won't split unless it hits a target, is stepped on or an enemy is hit by the blast.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_PYROMANIAP: Pyromania does not affect fall damage unless Frailty is active.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_BASEGAUGEP: Stock-based items increase maximum heat. Increasing attack speed increases heat dissipation.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_SUPERCRITI: Stock-based items increase blue portion. Increasing attack speed increases heat dissipation.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_ANTIC: <style=cKeywordName>Anticipation</style>For every 100 heat lost and/or gained, Arsonist gains 1 stack of Anticipation; After gaining 5 stacks, he may activate Masochism; Additional stacks increase damage and duration; All stacks are exhausted at the end.

<style=cKeywordName>Anticipation</style>For every 100 heat lost and/or gained, Arsonist gains 1 stack of Anticipation; After gaining 5 stacks, he may activate Spite. Additional stacks increase damage and duration. The amount of stacks removed at the end correlates with how long you stay in the state.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_LIFES: <style=cKeywordName>Lifesteal</style>Arsonist heals <color=#9FFF02>18%</color> of his damage dealt while Masochism is active.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_SURGE: <style=cKeywordName>Lifesteal</style>Arsonist heals <color=#9FFF02>5%</color> of his damage dealt while Masochism is active.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_DETON: <style=cKeywordName>Detonate</style>Arsonist explodes, dealing <style=cIsDamage>150% damage</style> times the amount of Anticipation Stacks accumulated.
<style=cKeywordName>Detonate</style>Arsonist explodes, dealing <style=cIsDamage>70% damage</style> times the amount of Anticipation Stacks accumulated.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_DOUBL: <style=cKeywordName>Double Tap</style>Shoot two projectiles for the heat cost of one.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_OVERHEAT_M: <style=cKeywordName>Overheat: Masochism</style>If Arsonist exits Masochism due to too much heat buildup, EX Overheat is applied, reducing your Move Speed and Damage to 70%. Cancelling, or otherwise letting the move run it's course applies Overheat, reducing your Attack speed to 50%
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_MASTER: As Arsonist, beat the game or obliterate on Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_ECLIPS: As Arsonist, beat the game on Eclipse 5 or higher, OR beat the game on Typhoon (Starstorm 2 mod Required).
As Arsonist, beat the game on Eclipse 8, OR beat the game on Inferno (Inferno mod Required).
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_FLAMET: As Arsonist, beat a stage without overheating.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_ARSONI: Kill a teleporter boss while it is ignited.
